action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed because test.pt not found in eval container's /data. Local predict.py test with val.pt succeeded (2557 predictions). Analysis: Eval environment may lack test.pt due to earlier overwrite of /data or missing provisioning. Need to debug and improve model. Decision: (1) Upgrade DKT: larger LSTM (embed_dim=128, hidden_size=256, 2 layers, extra FC), train 30 epochs with scheduler and gradient clipping to boost val_auc. (2) Add directory listing in predict.py to diagnose missing test.pt in eval. (3) Submit eval immediately after training to get test AUC and timing. If test.pt still missing, directory listing will reveal contents.
action.command: python -c "import torch; d=torch.load('/data/train.pt'); print('Train shape:', d['skill_ids'].shape, 'num_skills:', d['num_skills'], 'mean correct:', d['corrects'].float().mean().item())" && python train.py
